name: Youon Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Youon Technology Co.,Ltd provides green transport services through its Internet of Things technology and data platform. The company provides Wing of the line, a guide to the city green sharing travel service platform, which covers 220 cities, 32,000 shared bicycle service stations, and 800,000 shared bicycles. It also offers cloud service platform, site controller, lock car, public bike, and public bicycle car rental card services. The company was formerly known as Changzhou Youon Public Bicycle System Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Youon Technology Co.,Ltd in March 2018. Youon Technology Co.,Ltd is based in Changzhou, China.
